atomicity.message: The staged payload implements one bead only: vorch-01 config schema for defaults.verifier in internal/config/config.go plus matching internal/config/config_test.go coverage.

conditions.message: Staged config schema slice is formatted, tested, and constrained to verifier defaults implementation/tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2539: git diff --cached --name-status shows exactly M internal/config/config.go and M internal/config/config_test.go staged.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: git diff --cached --check produced no output.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: go test ./internal/config -run 'Verifier|Defaults|Merge|Source|Validate|Unknown|Write' -count=1, go test ./internal/config -count=1, and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The verifier config behavior follows the existing config-default pattern without creating a parallel loader or duplicate validation path.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2539: staged diff adds VerifierDefaults and dedicated helpers wired into existing mergeDefaults, Normalize, Validate, and noteDefaultsSources paths.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: rg over config.go/config_test.go confirms integration with the existing strict decoder, normalize, validate, and source-tracking flow.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: invalid verifier defaults are covered with targeted table tests.

conditions.message: The staged config-schema change does not treat standing verifier authorization as per-cell evidence or silently weaken verification claims.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2542: staged diff is exactly internal/config/config.go and internal/config/config_test.go.
BrightOwl message 2542: staged code adds config fields, merge/normalize/validate helpers, and source tracking; no verifier verdict or attestation-evidence logic is staged.
BrightOwl message 2542: TestLoadVerifierDefaultsMergeProjectOverrideAndSourceTracking asserts project authorized=false revokes global true and records source rows.
BrightOwl message 2542: TestLoadRejectsUnknownVerifierConfigKeys rejects unknown defaults.verifier.model.

conditions.message: The staged behavior has direct tests for merge/source tracking, validation, normalization, write/read round-trip, and unknown-key rejection.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2539: config.go adds VerifierDefaults, merge, normalize, validate, and source-tracking helpers.

ScarletMarsh message 2539: config_test.go adds TestLoadVerifierDefaultsMergeProjectOverrideAndSourceTracking, TestLoadRejectsBadVerifierDefaults, TestWriteVerifierDefaultsRoundTrips, and TestLoadRejectsUnknownVerifierConfigKeys.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: go test ./internal/config -run 'Verifier|Defaults|Merge|Source|Validate|Unknown|Write' -count=1 passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload satisfies vorch-01 config-schema acceptance: exact files only, verifier defaults load/merge/normalize/round-trip, malformed values fail with named errors, and tests pass.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2542: br show vorch-01 listed exact payload files internal/config/config.go and internal/config/config_test.go matching git diff --cached --name-status.
BrightOwl message 2542: git diff --cached --stat reported 2 files changed, 309 insertions, 4 deletions.
BrightOwl message 2542: git diff --cached --check produced no output.
BrightOwl message 2542: go test ./internal/config -run 'Verifier|Defaults|Merge|Source|Validate|Unknown' -count=1, go test ./internal/config -count=1, and go test ./... -count=1 passed.
BrightOwl message 2542: A17 schema surfaces are not staged in this config-only slice.

conditions.message: Evidence is sufficient for this config-schema slice: staged scope, formatter status, focused tests, package tests, and full repo tests were checked directly.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2539: git diff --cached --stat reports only internal/config/config.go and internal/config/config_test.go.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: git diff --cached -U8 inspected the actual staged implementation and test hunks.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: focused internal/config tests, package tests, and go test ./... all passed.

conditions.message: The staged slice stays inside vorch-01: internal config schema and tests only.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2542: git diff --cached --name-status showed only internal/config/config.go and internal/config/config_test.go.
BrightOwl message 2542: unrelated dirty worktree changes are unstaged; staged config files have no unstaged delta.
BrightOwl message 2542: no staged changes exist under internal/attestations, internal/backpressure, cmd/burpvalve, docs, or plans.

conditions.message: The staged payload contains no destructive operation surface; it only adds config schema, validation, normalization, merge/source tracking, and tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2539: staged additions contain no os.Remove, RemoveAll, exec.Command, git reset, git clean, rm -rf, network, credential, token, or password matches.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: manual staged-diff inspection found no delete/reset/force/migration/external-send/spend/deploy behavior.

conditions.message: The new verifier config data preserves merge/source integrity, rejects malformed values, normalizes repo-relative transcript paths, preserves condition model map entries, and round-trips through Write.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2542: mergeVerifierDefaults copies bool/int pointer values, merges condition_models per key, and records noteVerifierSources for each verifier field.

BrightOwl message 2542: validateVerifierDefaults rejects invalid spawn_method, max_parallel_verifiers outside 1..32, absolute/traversing/empty transcript_dir, invalid transcripts enum, empty condition model keys, NUL in condition model values, and NUL in default_model.
BrightOwl message 2542: tests cover global/project precedence, project false overriding global true, path cleaning, field source rows, and write/read preservation.

conditions.message: The staged payload has a governed security surface because it stores verifier authorization, spawn method, model aliases, read-only-tool preference, and transcript paths; implementation keeps it as validated config only.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2542: VerifierDefaults fields are config data only and no changes are staged under cmd/burpvalve, internal/attestations, internal/backpressure, docs, or plans.
BrightOwl message 2542: validateVerifierDefaults restricts spawn_method, transcript_dir, and transcript retention enum.

BrightOwl message 2542: TestLoadRejectsBadVerifierDefaults covers invalid spawn_method, max_parallel bounds, absolute/traversal/empty transcript_dir, invalid transcripts, empty condition-model key, and NUL values.
BrightOwl message 2542: project authorized=false revokes global authorized=true.

conditions.message: No governed visual surface exists in this staged payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2539: git diff --cached --name-status shows only internal/config/config.go and internal/config/config_test.go.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: staged diff contains no UI, TUI rendering, screenshot, CSS, layout, canvas, or browser-facing changes.

conditions.message: The only performance-adjacent surface is the verifier concurrency default, and staged validation bounds it to a small explicit range.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2539: staged config.go adds MaxParallelVerifiers *int and validates it with max_parallel_verifiers between 1 and 32.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: staged tests include max parallel low/high cases and merge/source tracking for max_parallel_verifiers=4.
ScarletMarsh message 2539: no runtime verifier fanout, command execution, I/O loop, or algorithmic path is staged; go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The config schema represents human/verifier authorization preferences without itself taking autonomous action.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2542: max_parallel_verifiers is advisory runtime guidance only and staged diff only adds config schema/tests.
BrightOwl message 2542: no staged code path spawns agents, sends mail, writes transcripts, or submits verifier responses.
BrightOwl message 2542: authorization_scope and authorized_at are metadata, and project authorized=false overrides global true.
